title: L'Abri, 4 Cowdray Drive, La Route de Noirmont, St Brelade: Planning Applicaiton (RC/2025/0424): Appeal Decision
text:
A decision made 27 January 2026:Decision Reference: MD-ENV-2026-85Public Subject: Planning appeal decision: RC/2025/0424 (L'Abri, 4 Cowdray Drive, La Route de Noirmont, St Brelade) Report Title: Planning appeal decision: RC/2025/0424 (L'Abri, 4 Cowdray Drive, La Route de Noirmont, St Brelade)Public Decision(s): The Minister resolved that he does not have the vires to determine this appeal made by a third party in respect of a decision to vary a planning condition under the provisions of Article 21 of the Planning and Building (Jersey) Law, 2002.Reason for Decision(s):Third‑party appeal rights under the Planning and Building (Jersey) Law, 2002 are currently narrowly confined to the following decisions only: (a) a decision to grant planning permission under Article 19(3) or (4); and (b) a decision under Article 19(6) to grant or refuse planning permission in respect of matters reserved for subsequent approval.Resource Implications: There are no new financial and/or staffing implications arising as a consequence of this Ministerial Decision. Action Required: The Ministerial Office to advise the Judicial Greffe of the decision.Signature: Signed By: Minister for the EnvironmentDate Signed: Date of Decision (If different from Date Signed): 

 <h1
